input.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Build Configuration Script
# Sets up the C project build environment with standard targets

set -e

PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
echo "Configuring build system for: $PROJECT_ROOT"

# Check for required tools
echo "Checking for required build tools..."

if ! command -v gcc &> /dev/null; then
    echo "ERROR: gcc not found. Please install GCC compiler."
    exit 1
fi

if ! command -v make &> /dev/null; then
    echo "ERROR: make not found. Please install GNU Make."
    exit 1
fi

echo "✓ gcc version: $(gcc --version | head -n1)"
echo "✓ make version: $(make --version | head -n1)"

# Create necessary directories
echo "Creating build directories..."
mkdir -p "$PROJECT_ROOT/build/bin"
mkdir -p "$PROJECT_ROOT/build/obj"

# Verify source files exist
echo "Verifying source files..."
if [ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/main.c" ]; then
    echo "✓ Found src/main.c"
else
    echo "ERROR: src/main.c not found"
    exit 1
fi

echo ""
echo "Build configuration complete!"
echo ""
echo "Available build targets:"
echo "  make all       - Build the project"
echo "  make debug     - Build with debugging symbols"
echo "  make release   - Build optimized release"
echo "  make run       - Build and run"
echo "  make install   - Install to /usr/local/bin/"
echo "  make clean     - Remove build artifacts"
echo "  make help      - Show all targets"
echo ""
echo "Quick start: make run"
